## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow the project guidelines, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-guidelines)
- [ ] Each commit includes `Signed-off-by` (DCO) — use `git commit -s`
- [ ] New public APIs or CLI options are documented
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Squash "fixup" commits after reviews
